case_title: CALARY BLUE VS. ELSA LUCILLE FRISCIRA

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JPT FILED BY BLUE, CALARY FRISCIRA, ELSA LUCILLE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CALARY BLUE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELSA LUCILLE FRISCIRA IS PRESENT. HEARING HELD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. BAILIFF: DEPUTY CHAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2023 - CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-03-2023 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CALARY BLUE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELSA LUCILLE FRISCIRA IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHOIRZED ZOOM. PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATES CLAIM WAS SERVED ON 3-26-23 WHICH IS 7 DAYS UNTIMELY. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO SUBMIT A PROPER ZOOM REQUIRE IF MAY APPEAR VIA ZOOM AT THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. DEPUTY: LOO. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,362.66 FILED BY BLUE, CALARY AS TO DEFENDANT FRISCIRA, ELSA LUCILLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2023 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $40. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUE, CALARY AS TO DEFENDANT FRISCIRA, ELSA LUCILLE
